item.title: CapCut template featuring @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur dancing to Dancing In The Dark by Rihanna while performing @71cent’s trending dance, turning a smooth, emotional track into a chaotic brainrot performance. Tung Tung Tung Sahu
item.description: By @.memescreens: CapCut template featuring @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur dancing to Dancing In The Dark by Rihanna while performing @71cent’s trending dance, turning a smooth, emotional track into a chaotic brainrot performance. Tung Tung Tung Sahu

item.title: the origins of Tung Tung Tung Sahur - one of the most iconic Brainrot characters comes from the Kentongan/Pentungan, an instrument used by indonesian muslim culture. @Noxa prompted this instrument in DALLE 3 on ChatGPT to arrive to this iconic figure Song
item.description: By @fabianmosele: the origins of Tung Tung Tung Sahur - one of the most iconic Brainrot characters comes from the Kentongan/Pentungan, an instrument used by indonesian muslim culture. @Noxa prompted this instrument in DALLE 3 on ChatGPT to arrive to this iconic figure Song
